subcodes.first_line: He hath verily read thy letter which thou didst send unto this Servant present before the Throne, and We have become apprised of its contents. Verily thy Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد قرء کتابک الذی ارسلته الی العبد الحاضر لدی العرش و اطلعنا بما فیه ان ربک
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution
